raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a claim for multiple charges on my account that were unknown to me. These charges were fraudulent. The claims reference number is XXXX. I opened the claim with an agent on XX/XX/year>. Then, it was closed on XX/XX/year>, with the result from American Express Fraud Protection Services stating, we have found these charges not to be fraudulent [ ] you received and used the Card issued in your name. The several charges I claimed as fraud were posted back on my Card without any proof of connection to these charges. The same day, my account was closed. I still havent received a letter about the closure. Calling American Express customer service was no help as they kept advising me to wait for a letter from them that explains everything. Its been a month, and Ive not received any letters. I decided to do some digging on my own about these charges. 
There was a total of 6 charges from 4 different merchants. I was able to receive responses/help from all 4 merchants, and of those 4, two merchants ( XXXX, XXXX ) gave me a written email response to help me with the case. Other 3 merchants ( XXXX, XXXX ) were able to speak to me on the phone to assist me with letting me know that I should pursue the case with American Express due to their privacy policy. 
XXXX response was very clear. They gave me the exact details matching the charges in question and were able to let me know that the name/email/phone # /address do not match with my card on file. 
I would like to get the claim re-investigated and evaluated as these are not my charges. 

7 fraudulent charges are : XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
